title: Momentum
shortDescription: RPG-style gamified habit tracker & life simulator.
fullDescription: A premium, web-based gamified productivity platform that turns building habits and completing daily tasks into an engaging RPG experience. Rewards consistency with Gold and XP, while penalizing missed tasks with HP damage.

title: SwiftRide
shortDescription: A modern, full-stack taxi booking & ridesharing platform.
fullDescription: A comprehensive Django-based taxi-booking and ridesharing web application connecting passengers and drivers dynamically. Features a real-time fare calculator, driver portal, passenger portal, and an analytics dashboard.

title: Velora
shortDescription: Digital art commission marketplace in neo-brutalist style.
fullDescription: A neo-brutalist marketplace connecting clients with digital artists. Features client & artist portals, a secure Razorpay escrow payment flow, visual order tracking pipelines, and dispute resolution systems.

title: Copper
shortDescription: A custom interpreted programming language built in C.
fullDescription: An educational interpreter built in C to explore compiler design concepts. Includes a custom lexer, recursive descent parser constructing an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), and a visitor-pattern evaluation engine.

title: Portfolio
shortDescription: A premium developer portfolio website with glassmorphism.
fullDescription: A premium personal developer portfolio website designed with a custom Lavender Cherry Blossom aesthetic. It features glassmorphism UI elements, dark/light mode toggle, scroll-linked animations, falling petals on the home page, interactive 3D perspective cards, and timeline visualizations.
